problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
mechanism: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors
hypothesis: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors may resolve What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
